# CANDIDATE: V14E_BEAR_HIGH_CONF_VIX_MODERATE_GATE

**Filed:** 2026-05-31  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** quality_gate  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

We propose to gate V14E bear-only observations by confidence≥high and VIX_MODERATE (15-20) to isolate a high-edge subset. Historical data shows this subset has WR≥95.8% and zero losses in 18 observations (score=10 + VIX_MODERATE). Accumulating 100 new such observations will verify if the edge persists out-of-sample.

## Mechanism

The V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE watcher currently accumulates all bear-only observations. We will modify it to only record observations where confidence="high" and VIX_MODERATE (15 ≤ VIX ≤ 20) to automation/state/watcher-observations.jsonl. After accumulating 100 new observations, we will compute the win rate and verify it is ≥55% for OP-21 promotion.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline
2. **Sample bias:** Accumulating new observations live. Historical sample (N=18 for score=10+VIX_MODERATE) may not persist forward due to regime change. Overfit risk: the historical edge was strong in a specific VIX and confidence regime.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (we are accumulating new observations as OOS test)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (watcher-only change; no trades placed)
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day: regime shift causing WR<55%. Max drawdown: hypothetical 100 consecutive losses (unlikely given historical WR). Blow-up scenario: not applicable as no trades are placed.
6. **Concentration:** Historical top-2 dates (5/04 N=8 + 5/15 N=6) = 59.8% of VIX_MODERATE raw P&L; deduped to 1 obs/date reduces concentration significantly. Will monitor live accumulation for concentration.

## Pre-merge gate

Gym validators pass; accumulate 100 new qualifying observations; compute WR≥55%.

## Confidence

8 / 10 -- based on historical WR=95.8% in VIX_MODERATE high-conf subset (N=24 deduped to 8 obs, WR=87.5%) and score=10+VIX_MODERATE subset (N=18 raw, WR=100%).

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Complements V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE by providing a higher-quality subset. No conflict with existing candidates; may enhance watcher-only options.
